---
title: "Population-Based GRPO / Reward Models"
description: ""
date: "2026-03-07"
categories: [rl]
status: "exploring"
---

helpful chat: https://claude.ai/chat/a844d6c1-7048-4340-a1dd-9a43892d2413

helpful doc: 

## Motivation

Why is this worth pursuing? What gap does it fill?

## Core Idea

Describe the approach. Include equations, pseudocode, or diagrams as needed.

## Open Questions

-

## Potential Experiments

-

## Related Work

-
